briefdescription.para: Response received but without nonce data.

memberdef.type: std::function< bool(const std::string &cid, const std::string &peer_id, const std::string &address)>
memberdef.definition: using sgns::AccountMessenger::BlockResponseHandler = std::function<bool( const std::string &cid, const std::string &peer_id, const std::string &address )>
memberdef.name: BlockResponseHandler

briefdescription.para: Basis of the account receiving topic.
Basis of the global requests topic.
Future of the subscription to the receiving topic.
Future of the subscription to the requests topic.
Addresses that responded with no nonce.
Timestamp of the first block response.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string address, std::shared_ptr< ipfs_pubsub::GossipPubSub > pubsub, InterfaceMethods methods)
memberdef.name: New

simplesect.para: Valid pointer if succeeds, nullptr otherwise

briefdescription.para: Get the Latest Nonce from the network.

parameterdescription.para: Timeout in miliseconds to get the latest nonce
Time tyo wait for subsequential nonce responses after first was received

simplesect.para: Nonce value if success, error otherwise

briefdescription.para: Request genesis block from the network (retries until timeout).

parameterdescription.para: Total timeout in milliseconds to wait for responses
Function to be called for each CID found (empty string if none)

simplesect.para: success if at least one response arrives before timeout, error otherwise

briefdescription.para: Request account creation from the network and invoke callback with found CIDs.

parameterdescription.para: Total timeout in milliseconds to wait for responses
Function to be called for each CID found (signature: void(std::string))

simplesect.para: success on scheduled request, error otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (uint64_t timeout_ms, std::string cid, std::function< void(outcome::result< std::string >)> callback=nullptr)
memberdef.name: RequestRegularBlock

briefdescription.para: Request a block by CID from the network (retries until timeout).

parameterdescription.para: Total timeout in milliseconds to wait for responses
Callback invoked with the CID result (or error)

simplesect.para: success on scheduled request, error otherwise

parameterdescription.para: Function to call for all block responses

briefdescription.para: Register handler for incoming head requests.

parameterdescription.para: Function to call when head request is received with topic list

briefdescription.para: Request heads broadcast for specific topics.

parameterdescription.para: Vector of topic names to request heads for

simplesect.para: outcome::success if request was sent, error otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string address, std::shared_ptr< ipfs_pubsub::GossipPubSub > pubsub, InterfaceMethods methods)
memberdef.name: AccountMessenger

briefdescription.para: Private constructor of the Account Messenger.
Requests the nonce to the network.
Request a block (by index) from the network (no callback).

parameterdescription.para: index of the requested block (0 = genesis, 1 = account, ...)

briefdescription.para: Request a block (by CID) from the network (no callback).
Callback of pubsub message when a response was received.

parameterdescription.para: Pubsub messaged to be parsed to proto data type

briefdescription.para: Callback of pubsub message when a request was received.

parameterdescription.para: Pubsub messaged to be parsed to proto data type

briefdescription.para: Sends a pubsub message to a set of topics.

simplesect.para: Success in case it sends, error otherwise

briefdescription.para: Handles the Block response package (calls global handler).
Handles the Head request package (calls registered handler).
